# Hookit

Hookit is a public discovery platform.

Users publish:
- Blogs
- Products
- Resources
- Websites
- Reviews
- Recommendations
- Travel discoveries
- Personal collections
- News
- Educational content

Important URLs:

https://hookit.online/explore

Creator Profiles:
https://hookit.online/creator/[username]

Category Pages:
https://hookit.online/category/[slug]

Search Pages:
https://hookit.online/search/[query]

Hook Pages:
https://hookit.online/hook/[slug]

Hookit mission:
Create once. Get discovered everywhere.
